reference: Hi, my name is Shrinivas and I am thirty-two years old. Of late, I have been experiencing a pain in my heart as if someone is poking it. I smoke a pack a day and I am working on quitting. I am a little concerned that I could have a heart-related disease like cancer. Please advise me on what the symptoms are and what is the best way to quit smoking. Is there a medicine available to help me quit this?
text: Hi, my name is Shrenivas, and I am 32 years old. Of late, I have been experiencing a pain in my heart as if someone is poking it. I smoke a pack a day, and I am working on quitting. I am a little concerned that I could have a heart-related disease like cancer. Please advise me on what the symptoms are and what is the best way to quit smoking. Is there a med available to help me quit this?
